docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-28-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S).. OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S).. THE DEC-14-2001 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
